---
title: "Somalia BAB Endline Report Student Data Build"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %Y')`"
output: 
  word_document:
    reference_docx: word-styles-reference-01.docx
    toc: yes
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
## Condensed graphics version

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE, include=FALSE, message=FALSE, comment=NA)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggpubr)
library(officer)
library(flextable)
library(data.table)
library(stringr)
library(forcats)
library(HH)
library(psych)

#Set significant digits
sigdig <- 2
sigdig2 <- 1
sigdig3 <- 0
sigdig4 <- 4

#Trim and decimal functions
trim <- function (x) gsub("^\\s+|\\s+$", "", x)
specify_decimal <- function(x, k) trimws(format(round(x, k), nsmall=k))
```

```{r read data files}
## Set Working directory to grab baseline files
setwd("C:/Users/besse/My Files/Somalia/Baseline/Longitudinal-SORDI-Laser")
##setwd("A:/ELRC/Data Team SHARED/Data Report Templates/Somalia/Baseline/Longitudinal-SORDI-Laser")

## read in location file and then remove unnecessary fields
location <- read.csv('./Location.csv')
location$ESPIGSites <- NULL
location$Laser.Head.Teacher.Endline <- NULL
location$LaserTeacherEndline <- NULL
location$LaserStudentEndline <- NULL
location$LaserBaselineLevel2 <- NULL
location$CreativeMidline <- NULL
location$LaserMidline <- NULL
location$LaserQualitativeMidline <- NULL
location$CreativeBaseline <- NULL
location$Note <- NULL
location$LASERBaseline <- NULL
location$AGESEarlySite <- NULL
location$AGESCurrentSite <- NULL
location$EducateYourChildrenIISite <- NULL

## read in data files
Bstudentsurveylong <- read.csv('./Bstudentsurveylong.csv')
Bstudentsurveycross <- read.csv('./Bstudentsurveycross.csv')

## Set Working directory to grab midline files
setwd("C:/Users/besse/My Files/Somalia/Midline/Longitudinal-SORDI-Laser")

Mstudentsurveylong <- read.csv('./MidlineStudentSurveyLong.csv')
Mstudentsurveycross <- read.csv('./Mstudentsurveycross.csv')

## set working directory to grab baseline level 2 EGRA and EGMA file
setwd("C:/Users/besse/My Files/Somalia/BaselineLevel2")
BL2studentsurveylong <- read.csv('./BaselineL2studentsurvey.csv')

## set working directory to grab endline level 2 student survey data
setwd("C:/Users/besse/My Files/Somalia/Endline/Longitudinal/")
EL2studentsurveylong <- read.csv('./EL2studentsurveylong.csv')
ELG2studentsurveylong <- read.csv('./ELG2studentsurveylong.csv')

```

```{r create baseline student long numeric variables}
## Recode items
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BSafety_03Recode = 5 - BSafety_03)
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BEquity_02Recode = 5 - BEquity_02)
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BEmtnlWellBeing_02Recode = 5 - BEmtnlWellBeing_02)
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BEmtnlWellBeing_03Recode = 5 - BEmtnlWellBeing_03)
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BEmtnlWellBeing_04Recode = 5 - BEmtnlWellBeing_04)
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BFriendship_04Recode = 5 - BFriendship_04)
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BSchool_03Recode = 5 - BSchool_03)
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BSchool_04Recode = 5 - BSchool_04)

Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BProgramGrade = ifelse(BBABProgram==1, 0, ifelse((BBABProgram==0 & BGrade==1), 1, 2)))

Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BStudentAgeGroup1 = case_when(
    BStudentAge < 12  ~ '4 to 11 year olds',
    BStudentAge > 11  ~ '12 to 20 year olds'
))

Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BStudentAgeGroup2 = case_when(
    BStudentAge < 9  ~ '4 to 8 year olds',
    BStudentAge < 17  ~ '9 to 16 year olds',
	TRUE ~ '17 to 20 year olds'
))								   

Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BStudentAgeGroup3 = case_when(
    BStudentAge < 7 ~ 'Under age Students (under 7)',
    BStudentAge < 12 ~ 'Primary Students (7-11)',
    BStudentAge < 17 ~ 'Intermediate Students (12-16)',
    TRUE ~ 'Older age Students (17 and over)'
))

Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BStudentLivesWithOtherCode = ifelse((BLiveWithMother==0 & BLiveWithFather==0), 1, 0))

Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BLanguages_n = case_when(
    BLanguages == 1 ~ 1,
    BLanguages == 2 ~ 2,
    BLanguages == 3 ~ 3,
    BLanguages == 4 ~ 9,
    BLanguages == 5 ~ 5,
    BLanguages == 6 ~ 9,
    BLanguages == 7 ~ 9,
    BLanguages == 8 ~ 9,
    BLanguages == 9 ~ 9
))

Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BLanguages2_n = case_when(
    BLanguages == 1 ~ 1,
    BLanguages == 2 ~ 2,
    BLanguages == 3 ~ 9,
    BLanguages == 4 ~ 9,
    BLanguages == 5 ~ 9,
    BLanguages == 6 ~ 9,
    BLanguages == 7 ~ 9,
    BLanguages == 8 ~ 9,
    BLanguages == 9 ~ 9
))

Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BMotherLiteracy_n = case_when(
    BMotherLiteracy == 0 ~ 0,
    BMotherLiteracy == 1 ~ 1,
    BMotherLiteracy == 2 ~ 0,
    BMotherLiteracy == 99 ~ 0,
    BMotherLiteracy == 888 ~ 0
))

Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BFatherLiteracy_n = case_when(
    BFatherLiteracy == 0 ~ 0,
    BFatherLiteracy == 1 ~ 1,
    BFatherLiteracy == 2 ~ 0,
    BFatherLiteracy == 99 ~ 0,
    BFatherLiteracy == 888 ~ 0
))

Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BQuranicPrior_n = case_when(
    BQuranicPrior == 0 ~ 0,
    BQuranicPrior == 1 ~ 1,
    BQuranicPrior == 99 ~ 0,
    BQuranicPrior == 888 ~ 0
))

Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BQuranicStill_n = case_when(
    BQuranicStill == 0 ~ 0,
    BQuranicStill == 1 ~ 1,
    BQuranicStill == 99 ~ 0,
    BQuranicStill == 888 ~ 0
))

Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BAttendOtherPrior_n = case_when(
    BAttendOtherPrior == 0 ~ 0,
    BAttendOtherPrior == 1 ~ 1,
    BAttendOtherPrior == 99 ~ 0,
    BAttendOtherPrior == 888 ~ 0
))

Bstudentsurveylong$BEquity_01_n <- sapply(Bstudentsurveylong$BEquity_01, as.numeric)
Bstudentsurveylong$BEquity_02_n <- sapply(Bstudentsurveylong$BEquity_02, as.numeric)
Bstudentsurveylong$BEquity_02Recode_n <- sapply(Bstudentsurveylong$BEquity_02Recode, as.numeric)

Bstudentsurveylong$BIDPFamily_n <- sapply(Bstudentsurveylong$BIDPFamily, as.numeric)
```

```{r create midline student long numeric variables}
## Recode items
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MSafety_03Recode = 5 - MSafety_03)
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MEquity_02Recode = 5 - MEquity_02)
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MEmtnlWellBeing_02Recode = 5 - MEmtnlWellBeing_02)
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MEmtnlWellBeing_03Recode = 5 - MEmtnlWellBeing_03)
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MEmtnlWellBeing_04Recode = 5 - MEmtnlWellBeing_04)
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MFriendship_04Recode = 5 - MFriendship_04)
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MSchool_03Recode = 5 - MSchool_03)
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MSchool_04Recode = 5 - MSchool_04)
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MPhysWellBeing_01Recode = 5 - MPhysWellBeing_01)
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MPhysWellBeing_02Recode = 5 - MPhysWellBeing_02)
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MPhysWellBeing_03Recode = 5 - MPhysWellBeing_03)
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MBehaveEngage_03Recode = 5 - MBehaveEngage_03)

Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MProgramGrade = ifelse(MBABProgram==1, 0, ifelse((MBABProgram==0 & MGrade==1), 1, 2)))

Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MAgeGroup1 = case_when(
    MStudentAge < 12  ~ '4 to 11 year olds',
    MStudentAge > 11  ~ '12 to 20 year olds'
))

Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MAgeGroup2 = case_when(
    MStudentAge < 9  ~ '4 to 8 year olds',
    MStudentAge < 17  ~ '9 to 16 year olds',
	TRUE ~ '17 to 20 year olds'
))								   

Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MAgeGroup3 = case_when(
    MStudentAge < 7 ~ 'Under age Students (under 7)',
    MStudentAge < 12 ~ 'Primary Students (7-11)',
    MStudentAge < 17 ~ 'Intermediate Students (12-16)',
    TRUE ~ 'Older age Students (17 and over)'
))

Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MStudentLivesWithOtherCode = ifelse((MLiveWithMother==0 & MLiveWithFather==0), 1, 0))

Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MLanguages_n = case_when(
    MLanguages == 1 ~ 1,
    MLanguages == 2 ~ 2,
    MLanguages == 3 ~ 3,
    MLanguages == 4 ~ 9,
    MLanguages == 5 ~ 5,
    MLanguages == 6 ~ 9,
    MLanguages == 7 ~ 9,
    MLanguages == 8 ~ 9,
    MLanguages == 9 ~ 9
))

Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MLanguages2_n = case_when(
    MLanguages == 1 ~ 1,
    MLanguages == 2 ~ 2,
    MLanguages == 3 ~ 9,
    MLanguages == 4 ~ 9,
    MLanguages == 5 ~ 9,
    MLanguages == 6 ~ 9,
    MLanguages == 7 ~ 9,
    MLanguages == 8 ~ 9,
    MLanguages == 9 ~ 9
))

Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MMotherLiteracy_n = case_when(
    MMotherLiteracy == 0 ~ 0,
    MMotherLiteracy == 1 ~ 1,
    MMotherLiteracy == 2 ~ 0,
    MMotherLiteracy == 99 ~ 0,
    MMotherLiteracy == 888 ~ 0
))

Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MFatherLiteracy_n = case_when(
    MFatherLiteracy == 0 ~ 0,
    MFatherLiteracy == 1 ~ 1,
    MFatherLiteracy == 2 ~ 0,
    MFatherLiteracy == 99 ~ 0,
    MFatherLiteracy == 888 ~ 0
))
```

```{r create baseline level 2 student long numeric variables}
## Recode items
BL2studentsurveylong <- BL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(BL2ProgramGrade = ifelse(BL2BABProgram==1, 0, ifelse((BL2BABProgram==0 & BL2Grade==1), 1, 2)))

BL2studentsurveylong <- BL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(BL2AgeGroup1 = case_when(
    BL2StudentAge < 12  ~ '4 to 11 year olds',
    BL2StudentAge > 11  ~ '12 to 20 year olds'
))

BL2studentsurveylong <- BL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(BL2AgeGroup2 = case_when(
    BL2StudentAge < 9  ~ '4 to 8 year olds',
    BL2StudentAge < 17  ~ '9 to 16 year olds',
	TRUE ~ '17 to 20 year olds'
))								   

BL2studentsurveylong <- BL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(BL2AgeGroup3 = case_when(
    BL2StudentAge < 7 ~ 'Under age Students (under 7)',
    BL2StudentAge < 12 ~ 'Primary Students (7-11)',
    BL2StudentAge < 17 ~ 'Intermediate Students (12-16)',
    TRUE ~ 'Older age Students (17 and over)'
))

BL2studentsurveylong$BL2NumIdentify_01_n <- sapply(BL2studentsurveylong$BL2NumIdentify_01, as.numeric)
```

```{r create endline level 2 student long numeric variables}

EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2ProgramGrade = ifelse(EL2BABProgram==1, 0, 1))

EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2AgeGroup1 = case_when(
    EL2StudentAge < 12  ~ '4 to 11 year olds',
    EL2StudentAge > 11  ~ '12 to 20 year olds'
))

EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2AgeGroup2 = case_when(
    EL2StudentAge < 9  ~ '4 to 8 year olds',
    EL2StudentAge < 17  ~ '9 to 16 year olds',
	TRUE ~ '17 to 20 year olds'
))								   

EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2AgeGroup3 = case_when(
    EL2StudentAge < 7 ~ 'Under age Students (under 7)',
    EL2StudentAge < 12 ~ 'Primary Students (7-11)',
    EL2StudentAge < 17 ~ 'Intermediate Students (12-16)',
    TRUE ~ 'Older age Students (17 and over)'
))

EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2StudentLivesWithOtherCode = ifelse((EL2LiveWithMother==0 & EL2LiveWithFather==0), 1, 0))

EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2Languages_n = case_when(
    EL2Languages == 1 ~ 1,
    EL2Languages == 2 ~ 2,
    EL2Languages == 3 ~ 3,
    EL2Languages == 4 ~ 9,
    EL2Languages == 5 ~ 5,
    EL2Languages == 6 ~ 9,
    EL2Languages == 7 ~ 9,
    EL2Languages == 8 ~ 9,
    EL2Languages == 9 ~ 9
))

EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2Languages2_n = case_when(
    EL2Languages == 1 ~ 1,
    EL2Languages == 2 ~ 2,
    EL2Languages == 3 ~ 9,
    EL2Languages == 4 ~ 9,
    EL2Languages == 5 ~ 9,
    EL2Languages == 6 ~ 9,
    EL2Languages == 7 ~ 9,
    EL2Languages == 8 ~ 9,
    EL2Languages == 9 ~ 9
))

EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2Languages3_n = case_when(
    EL2Languages == 1 ~ 1,
    EL2Languages == 2 ~ 1,
    EL2Languages == 3 ~ 0,
    EL2Languages == 4 ~ 0,
    EL2Languages == 5 ~ 0,
    EL2Languages == 6 ~ 0,
    EL2Languages == 7 ~ 0,
    EL2Languages == 8 ~ 0,
    EL2Languages == 9 ~ 0
))

EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2MotherLiteracy_n = case_when(
    EL2MotherLiteracy == 0 ~ 0,
    EL2MotherLiteracy == 1 ~ 1,
    EL2MotherLiteracy == 2 ~ 0,
    EL2MotherLiteracy == 99 ~ 0,
    EL2MotherLiteracy == 888 ~ 0
))

EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2FatherLiteracy_n = case_when(
    EL2FatherLiteracy == 0 ~ 0,
    EL2FatherLiteracy == 1 ~ 1,
    EL2FatherLiteracy == 2 ~ 0,
    EL2FatherLiteracy == 99 ~ 0,
    EL2FatherLiteracy == 888 ~ 0
))

EL2studentsurveylong$EL2SES_01_n <- sapply(EL2studentsurveylong$EL2SES_01, as.numeric)
EL2studentsurveylong$EL2SES_04_n <- sapply(EL2studentsurveylong$EL2SES_04, as.numeric)
```

```{r create endline level 1 grade 2 student long numeric variables}

ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2ProgramGrade = 1)

ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2AgeGroup1 = case_when(
    ELG2StudentAge < 12  ~ '4 to 11 year olds',
    ELG2StudentAge > 11  ~ '12 to 20 year olds'
))

ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2AgeGroup2 = case_when(
    ELG2StudentAge < 9  ~ '4 to 8 year olds',
    ELG2StudentAge < 17  ~ '9 to 16 year olds',
	TRUE ~ '17 to 20 year olds'
))								   

ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2AgeGroup3 = case_when(
    ELG2StudentAge < 7 ~ 'Under age Students (under 7)',
    ELG2StudentAge < 12 ~ 'Primary Students (7-11)',
    ELG2StudentAge < 17 ~ 'Intermediate Students (12-16)',
    TRUE ~ 'Older age Students (17 and over)'
))

ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2StudentLivesWithOtherCode = ifelse((ELG2LiveWithMother==0 & ELG2LiveWithFather==0), 1, 0))

ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2Languages_n = case_when(
    ELG2Languages == 1 ~ '1',
    ELG2Languages == 2 ~ '2',
    ELG2Languages == 3 ~ '3',
    ELG2Languages == 4 ~ '9',
    ELG2Languages == 5 ~ '5',
    ELG2Languages == 6 ~ '9',
    ELG2Languages == 7 ~ '9',
    ELG2Languages == 8 ~ '9',
    ELG2Languages == 9 ~ '9'
))

ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2Languages2_n = case_when(
    ELG2Languages == 1 ~ '1',
    ELG2Languages == 2 ~ '2',
    ELG2Languages == 3 ~ '9',
    ELG2Languages == 4 ~ '9',
    ELG2Languages == 5 ~ '9',
    ELG2Languages == 6 ~ '9',
    ELG2Languages == 7 ~ '9',
    ELG2Languages == 8 ~ '9',
    ELG2Languages == 9 ~ '9'
))

ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2Languages3_n = case_when(
    ELG2Languages == 1 ~ 1,
    ELG2Languages == 2 ~ 1,
    ELG2Languages == 3 ~ 0,
    ELG2Languages == 4 ~ 0,
    ELG2Languages == 5 ~ 0,
    ELG2Languages == 6 ~ 0,
    ELG2Languages == 7 ~ 0,
    ELG2Languages == 8 ~ 0,
    ELG2Languages == 9 ~ 0
))

ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2MotherLiteracy_n = case_when(
    ELG2MotherLiteracy == 0 ~ 0,
    ELG2MotherLiteracy == 1 ~ 1,
    ELG2MotherLiteracy == 2 ~ 0,
    ELG2MotherLiteracy == 99 ~ 0,
    ELG2MotherLiteracy == 888 ~ 0
))

ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2FatherLiteracy_n = case_when(
    ELG2FatherLiteracy == 0 ~ 0,
    ELG2FatherLiteracy == 1 ~ 1,
    ELG2FatherLiteracy == 2 ~ 0,
    ELG2FatherLiteracy == 99 ~ 0,
    ELG2FatherLiteracy == 888 ~ 0
))
```

```{r create baseline student cross numeric variables EGRA EGMA}
Bstudentsurveycross <- Bstudentsurveycross %>% mutate (BLanguages = case_when(
  BLanguages_01 == 1 ~ 'Maay',
  BLanguages_02 == 1 ~ 'Maxaa tiri',
  BLanguages_03 == 1 ~ 'Dabarre',
  BLanguages_04 == 1 ~ 'Garre',
  BLanguages_05 == 1 ~ 'Barwaani',
  BLanguages_06 == 1 ~ 'Jiida',
  BLanguages_07 == 1 ~ 'Tunni',
  BLanguages_08 == 1 ~ 'Baajuun',
  BLanguages_09 == 1 ~ 'Other',
  TRUE ~ 'Other'
))

Bstudentsurveycross <- Bstudentsurveycross %>% mutate (BLanguages2 = case_when(
  BLanguages_01 == 1 ~ 'Maay',
  BLanguages_02 == 1 ~ 'Maxaa tiri',
  BLanguages_03 == 1 ~ 'Other',
  BLanguages_04 == 1 ~ 'Other',
  BLanguages_05 == 1 ~ 'Other',
  BLanguages_06 == 1 ~ 'Other',
  BLanguages_07 == 1 ~ 'Other',
  BLanguages_08 == 1 ~ 'Other',
  BLanguages_09 == 1 ~ 'Other',
  TRUE ~ 'Other'
))								   
Bstudentsurveycross <- Bstudentsurveycross %>% mutate(BStudentAgeGroup1 = case_when(
    BStudentAge < 12  ~ '4 to 11 year olds',
    BStudentAge > 11  ~ '12 to 20 year olds'
))

Bstudentsurveycross <- Bstudentsurveycross %>% mutate(BStudentAgeGroup2 = case_when(
    BStudentAge < 9  ~ '4 to 8 year olds',
    BStudentAge < 17  ~ '9 to 16 year olds',
	TRUE ~ '17 to 20 year olds'
))
```

```{r create midline student cross numeric variables EGRA EGMA}
Mstudentsurveycross <- Mstudentsurveycross %>% mutate (MLanguages = case_when(
  MLanguages_01 == 1 ~ 'Maay',
  MLanguages_02 == 1 ~ 'Maxaa tiri',
  MLanguages_03 == 1 ~ 'Dabarre',
  MLanguages_04 == 1 ~ 'Garre',
  MLanguages_05 == 1 ~ 'Barwaani',
  MLanguages_06 == 1 ~ 'Jiida',
  MLanguages_07 == 1 ~ 'Tunni',
  MLanguages_08 == 1 ~ 'Baajuun',
  MLanguages_09 == 1 ~ 'Other',
  TRUE ~ 'Other'
))

Mstudentsurveycross <- Mstudentsurveycross %>% mutate (MLanguages2 = case_when(
  MLanguages_01 == 1 ~ 'Maay',
  MLanguages_02 == 1 ~ 'Maxaa tiri',
  MLanguages_03 == 1 ~ 'Other',
  MLanguages_04 == 1 ~ 'Other',
  MLanguages_05 == 1 ~ 'Other',
  MLanguages_06 == 1 ~ 'Other',
  MLanguages_07 == 1 ~ 'Other',
  MLanguages_08 == 1 ~ 'Other',
  MLanguages_09 == 1 ~ 'Other',
  TRUE ~ 'Other'
))								   
Mstudentsurveycross <- Mstudentsurveycross %>% mutate(MStudentAgeGroup1 = case_when(
    MStudentAge < 12  ~ '4 to 11 year olds',
    MStudentAge > 11  ~ '12 to 20 year olds'
))

Mstudentsurveycross <- Mstudentsurveycross %>% mutate(MStudentAgeGroup2 = case_when(
    MStudentAge < 9  ~ '4 to 8 year olds',
    MStudentAge < 17  ~ '9 to 16 year olds',
	TRUE ~ '17 to 20 year olds'
))
```

```{r create baseline student long new numeric variables}
BOralRdFlncyList <- c('BOralRdFlncy_01_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_02_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_03_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_04_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_05_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_06_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_07_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_08_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_09_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_10_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_11_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_12_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_13_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_14_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_15_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_16_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_17_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_18_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_19_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_20_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_21_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_22_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_23_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_24_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_25_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_26_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_27_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_28_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_29_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_30_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_31_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_32_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_33_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_34_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_35_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_36_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_37_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_38_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_39_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_40_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_41_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_42_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_43_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_44_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_45_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_46_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_47_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_48_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_49_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_50_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_51_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_52_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_53_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_54_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_55_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_56_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_57_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_58_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_59_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_60_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_61_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_62_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_63_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_64_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_65_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_66_n')
Bstudentsurveylong$BOralRdFlncyItemsAttempt_n <- apply(Bstudentsurveylong[BOralRdFlncyList], 1, function(x) sum(!is.na(x)))
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BOralRdFlncyGridAutoStop_f = ifelse(BOralRdFlncyItemsAttempt_n <= BOralRdFlncyAutoStop_n, 'TRUE', 'FALSE'))
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BOralRdFlncyItemsCorrect_n = ifelse(BOralRdFlncyGridAutoStop_f=='TRUE', 0, BOralRdFlncyItemsCorrect_n))
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n = ifelse(BOralRdFlncyGridAutoStop_f=='TRUE', 0, BOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n))
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n = ifelse((BOralRdFlncyItemsAttempt_n > BOralRdFlncyAutoStop_n & round(BOralRdFlncyItemsAttempt_n/(60-BOralRdFlncyTimeRemain_n + 0.000001), sigdig2) < 2.25), round(BOralRdFlncyItemsCorrect_n*60/(60.000001-BOralRdFlncyTimeRemain_n),sigdig2), BOralRdFlncyItemsCorrect_n))
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BOralRdFlncyZeroScore_n = ifelse(BOralRdFlncyItemsCorrect_n == 0, 1, 0))

BReadCompList <- c('BReadComp_01_n', 'BReadComp_02_n', 'BReadComp_03_n', 'BReadComp_04_n', 'BReadComp_05_n')
Bstudentsurveylong$BReadCompItemsAttempt_n <- apply(Bstudentsurveylong[BReadCompList], 1, function(x) sum(!is.na(x)))
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BReadCompZeroScore_n = ifelse(BReadCompItemsCorrect_n == 0, 1, 0))

BDictation_01List <- c('BDictation_01_01_n', 'BDictation_01_02_n', 'BDictation_01_03_n', 'BDictation_01_04_n', 'BDictation_01_05_n')
Bstudentsurveylong$BDictation_01_ItemsAttempt_n <- apply(Bstudentsurveylong[BDictation_01List], 1, function(x) sum(!is.na(x)))

BDictation_02List <- c('BDictation_02_01_n', 'BDictation_02_02_n', 'BDictation_02_03_n')
Bstudentsurveylong$BDictation_02_ItemsAttempt_n <- apply(Bstudentsurveylong[BDictation_02List], 1, function(x) sum(!is.na(x)))

Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BEGMATotal_n = BNumIdentifyItemsCorrect_n + BNumDiscItemsCorrect_n + BMissNumItemsCorrect_n + BAddLvl1ItemsCorrect_n + BAddLvl2ItemsCorrect_n + BSubLvl1ItemsCorrect_n + BSubLvl2ItemsCorrect_n + BWordProbItemsCorrect_n)

Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BEGMATotalAdjusted_n = round((BNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n + BNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n + BMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n + BAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n + BAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n + BSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n + BSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n + BWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)/8), sigdig2)

Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BEGMATotalPercent_n = (BEGMATotal_n/96)*100)

Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BEGRATotal_n =  BListeningCompItemsCorrect_n + BPhonAwareItemsCorrect_n + BLetSoundItemsCorrect_n + BInventWordItemsCorrect_n + BRealWordsItemsCorrect_n + BOralRdFlncyItemsCorrect_n + BReadCompItemsCorrect_n + BDictation_01_ItemsCorrect_n + BDictation_02_ItemsCorrect_n)

Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n =  round((BListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n + BPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n + BLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n + BInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n + BRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n + BOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n + BReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n + BDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n + BDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n)/9), sigdig2)

Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BAttendAnyOther_n = ifelse((BQuranicPrior_n==1 | BAttendOtherPrior_n==1), 1, 0))

Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BEGRATotalPercent_n = (BEGRATotal_n/294)*100)
```

```{r create midline student long new numeric variables}
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n = ifelse(MInventWordGridAutoStop_f=='TRUE', 0, MInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n))
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MInventWordItemsPerMinuteCreative_n = ifelse((MInventWordItemsAttempt_n > MInventWordAutoStop_n & round(MInventWordItemsAttempt_n/(60-MInventWordTimeRemain_n + 0.000001), sigdig2) < 2), round(MInventWordItemsCorrect_n*60/(60.000001-MInventWordTimeRemain_n),sigdig2), MInventWordItemsCorrect_n))
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MInventWordZeroScore_n = ifelse(MInventWordItemsCorrect_n == 0, 1, 0))

MRealWordsList <- c('MRealWords_01_n', 'MRealWords_02_n', 'MRealWords_03_n', 'MRealWords_04_n', 'MRealWords_05_n', 'MRealWords_06_n', 'MRealWords_07_n', 'MRealWords_08_n', 'MRealWords_09_n', 'MRealWords_10_n', 'MRealWords_11_n', 'MRealWords_12_n', 'MRealWords_13_n', 'MRealWords_14_n', 'MRealWords_15_n', 'MRealWords_16_n', 'MRealWords_17_n', 'MRealWords_18_n', 'MRealWords_19_n', 'MRealWords_20_n', 'MRealWords_21_n', 'MRealWords_22_n', 'MRealWords_23_n', 'MRealWords_24_n', 'MRealWords_25_n', 'MRealWords_26_n', 'MRealWords_27_n', 'MRealWords_28_n', 'MRealWords_29_n', 'MRealWords_30_n', 'MRealWords_31_n', 'MRealWords_32_n', 'MRealWords_33_n', 'MRealWords_34_n', 'MRealWords_35_n', 'MRealWords_36_n', 'MRealWords_37_n', 'MRealWords_38_n', 'MRealWords_39_n', 'MRealWords_40_n', 'MRealWords_41_n', 'MRealWords_42_n', 'MRealWords_43_n', 'MRealWords_44_n', 'MRealWords_45_n', 'MRealWords_46_n', 'MRealWords_47_n', 'MRealWords_48_n', 'MRealWords_49_n', 'MRealWords_50_n')
Mstudentsurveylong$MRealWordsItemsAttempt_n <- apply(Mstudentsurveylong[MRealWordsList], 1, function(x) sum(!is.na(x)))
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MRealWordsGridAutoStop_f = ifelse(MRealWordsItemsAttempt_n <= MRealWordsAutoStop_n, 'TRUE', 'FALSE'))
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MRealWordsItemsCorrect_n = ifelse(MRealWordsGridAutoStop_f=='TRUE', 0, MRealWordsItemsCorrect_n))
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n = ifelse(MRealWordsGridAutoStop_f=='TRUE', 0, MRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n))
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MRealWordsItemsPerMinuteCreative_n = ifelse((MRealWordsItemsAttempt_n > MRealWordsAutoStop_n & round(MRealWordsItemsAttempt_n/(60-MRealWordsTimeRemain_n + 0.000001), sigdig2) < 2.2), round(MRealWordsItemsCorrect_n*60/(60.000001-MRealWordsTimeRemain_n),sigdig2), MRealWordsItemsCorrect_n))

Mstudentsurveylong$MOralRdFlncyItemsAttempt_n <- apply(Mstudentsurveylong[MOralRdFlncyList], 1, function(x) sum(!is.na(x)))
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MOralRdFlncyGridAutoStop_f = ifelse(MOralRdFlncyItemsAttempt_n <= MOralRdFlncyAutoStop_n, 'TRUE', 'FALSE'))
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MOralRdFlncyItemsCorrect_n = ifelse(MOralRdFlncyGridAutoStop_f=='TRUE', 0, MOralRdFlncyItemsCorrect_n))
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n = ifelse(MOralRdFlncyGridAutoStop_f=='TRUE', 0, MOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n))
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n = ifelse((MOralRdFlncyItemsAttempt_n > MOralRdFlncyAutoStop_n & round(MOralRdFlncyItemsAttempt_n/(60-MOralRdFlncyTimeRemain_n + 0.000001), sigdig2) < 2.25), round(MOralRdFlncyItemsCorrect_n*60/(60.000001-MOralRdFlncyTimeRemain_n),sigdig2), MOralRdFlncyItemsCorrect_n))
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MOralRdFlncyZeroScore_n = ifelse(MOralRdFlncyItemsCorrect_n == 0, 1, 0))

MReadCompList <- c('MReadComp_01_n', 'MReadComp_02_n', 'MReadComp_03_n', 'MReadComp_04_n', 'MReadComp_05_n')
Mstudentsurveylong$MReadCompItemsAttempt_n <- apply(Mstudentsurveylong[MReadCompList], 1, function(x) sum(!is.na(x)))
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MReadCompZeroScore_n = ifelse(MReadCompItemsCorrect_n == 0, 1, 0))

MDictation_01List <- c('MDictation_01_01_n', 'MDictation_01_02_n', 'MDictation_01_03_n', 'MDictation_01_04_n', 'MDictation_01_05_n')
Mstudentsurveylong$MDictation_01_ItemsAttempt_n <- apply(Mstudentsurveylong[MDictation_01List], 1, function(x) sum(!is.na(x)))

MDictation_02List <- c('MDictation_02_01_n', 'MDictation_02_02_n', 'MDictation_02_03_n')
Mstudentsurveylong$MDictation_02_ItemsAttempt_n <- apply(Mstudentsurveylong[MDictation_02List], 1, function(x) sum(!is.na(x)))

Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MEGMATotal_n = MNumIdentifyItemsCorrect_n + MNumDiscItemsCorrect_n + MMissNumItemsCorrect_n + MAddLvl1ItemsCorrect_n + MAddLvl2ItemsCorrect_n + MSubLvl1ItemsCorrect_n + MSubLvl2ItemsCorrect_n + MWordProbItemsCorrect_n)

Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MEGMATotalAdjusted_n = round((MNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n + MNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n + MMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n + MAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n + MAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n + MSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n + MSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n + MWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)/8), sigdig2)

Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MEGMATotalPercent_n = (MEGMATotal_n/96)*100)

Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MEGRATotal_n =  MListeningCompItemsCorrect_n + MPhonAwareItemsCorrect_n + MLetSoundItemsCorrect_n + MInventWordItemsCorrect_n + MRealWordsItemsCorrect_n + MOralRdFlncyItemsCorrect_n + MReadCompItemsCorrect_n + MDictation_01_ItemsCorrect_n + MDictation_02_ItemsCorrect_n)

Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MEGRATotalAdjusted_n =  round((MListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n + MPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n + MLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n + MInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n + MRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n + MOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n + MReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n + MDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n + MDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n)/9), sigdig2)

Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MEGRATotalPercent_n = (MEGRATotal_n/294)*100)

Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MSurveyDuration = difftime(strptime(MEndTime, format = "%H:%M"), strptime(MBeginTime, format="%H:%M")))
```

```{r create baseline level 2 student long new numeric variables}
BL2studentsurveylong$BL2Dictation_01_ItemsAttempt_n <- apply(BL2studentsurveylong[BL2Dictation_01List], 1, function(x) sum(!is.na(x)))

BL2studentsurveylong <- BL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(BL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n = round((BL2NumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n + BL2NumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n + BL2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n + BL2AddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n + BL2AddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n + BL2SubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n + BL2SubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n + BL2MultLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n + BL2DivLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n + BL2WordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)/10), sigdig2)

BL2studentsurveylong <- BL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(BL2EGMATotalPercent_n = (BL2EGMATotal_n/110)*100)

BL2studentsurveylong <- BL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(BL2EGRATotal_n =  BL2ListeningCompItemsCorrect_n + BL2PhonAwareItemsCorrect_n + BL2LetSoundItemsCorrect_n + BL2InventWordItemsCorrect_n + BL2RealWordsItemsCorrect_n + BL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrect_n + BL2ReadCompItemsCorrect_n + BL2Dictation_01_ItemsCorrect_n + BL2Dictation_02_ItemsCorrect_n)

BL2studentsurveylong <- BL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n =  round((BL2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n + BL2PhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n + BL2LetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n + BL2InventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n + BL2RealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n + BL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n + BL2ReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n + BL2Dictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n + BL2Dictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n)/9), sigdig2)

BL2studentsurveylong <- BL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(BL2EGRATotalPercent_n = (BL2EGRATotal_n/324)*100)
```

```{r create endline level 2 student long new numeric variables}
EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n = ifelse(EL2OralRdFlncyGridAutoStop_f=='TRUE', 0, EL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n))
EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n = ifelse((EL2OralRdFlncyItemsAttempt_n > EL2OralRdFlncyAutoStop_n & round(EL2OralRdFlncyItemsAttempt_n/(60-EL2OralRdFlncyTimeRemain_n + 0.000001), sigdig2) < 2.25), round(EL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrect_n*60/(60.000001-EL2OralRdFlncyTimeRemain_n),sigdig2), EL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrect_n))
EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2OralRdFlncyZeroScore_n = ifelse(EL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrect_n == 0, 1, 0))

EL2ReadCompList <- c('EL2ReadComp_01_n', 'EL2ReadComp_02_n', 'EL2ReadComp_03_n', 'EL2ReadComp_04_n', 'EL2ReadComp_05_n', 'EL2ReadComp_06_n', 'EL2ReadComp_07_n', 'EL2ReadComp_08_n')
EL2studentsurveylong$EL2ReadCompItemsAttempt_n <- apply(EL2studentsurveylong[EL2ReadCompList], 1, function(x) sum(!is.na(x)))
EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2ReadCompZeroScore_n = ifelse(EL2ReadCompItemsCorrect_n == 0, 1, 0))

EL2Dictation_01List <- c('EL2Dictation_01_01_n', 'EL2Dictation_01_02_n', 'EL2Dictation_01_03_n', 'EL2Dictation_01_04_n', 'EL2Dictation_01_05_n')
EL2studentsurveylong$EL2Dictation_01_ItemsAttempt_n <- apply(EL2studentsurveylong[EL2Dictation_01List], 1, function(x) sum(!is.na(x)))

EL2Dictation_02List <- c('EL2Dictation_02_01_n', 'EL2Dictation_02_02_n', 'EL2Dictation_02_03_n', 'EL2Dictation_02_04_n')
EL2studentsurveylong$EL2Dictation_02_ItemsAttempt_n <- apply(EL2studentsurveylong[EL2Dictation_02List], 1, function(x) sum(!is.na(x)))

EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2EGMATotal_n = EL2NumIdentifyItemsCorrect_n + EL2NumDiscItemsCorrect_n + EL2MissNumItemsCorrect_n + EL2AddLvl1ItemsCorrect_n + EL2AddLvl2ItemsCorrect_n + EL2SubLvl1ItemsCorrect_n + EL2SubLvl2ItemsCorrect_n + EL2MultLvl1ItemsCorrect_n + EL2DivLvl1ItemsCorrect_n +  EL2WordProbItemsCorrect_n)

EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n = round((EL2NumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n + EL2NumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n + EL2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n + EL2AddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n + EL2AddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n + EL2SubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n + EL2SubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n + EL2MultLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n + EL2DivLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n + EL2WordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)/10), sigdig2)

EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2EGMATotalPercent_n = (EL2EGMATotal_n/110)*100)

EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2EGRATotal_n =  EL2ListeningCompItemsCorrect_n + EL2PhonAwareItemsCorrect_n + EL2LetSoundItemsCorrect_n + EL2InventWordItemsCorrect_n + EL2RealWordsItemsCorrect_n + EL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrect_n + EL2ReadCompItemsCorrect_n + EL2Dictation_01_ItemsCorrect_n + EL2Dictation_02_ItemsCorrect_n)

EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n =  round((EL2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n + EL2PhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n + EL2LetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n + EL2InventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n + EL2RealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n + EL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n + EL2ReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n + EL2Dictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n + EL2Dictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n)/9), sigdig2)

EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2EGRATotalPercent_n = (EL2EGRATotal_n/324)*100)

```

```{r create endline level 1 grade 2 student long new numeric variables}
ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2InventWordGridAutoStop_f = ifelse(ELG2InventWordItemsAttempt_n <= ELG2InventWordAutoStop_n, 'TRUE', 'FALSE'))

ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2Dictation_02_ItemsAttempt_n <- apply(ELG2studentsurveylong[ELG2Dictation_02List], 1, function(x) sum(!is.na(x)))

ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2EGMATotal_n = ELG2NumIdentifyItemsCorrect_n + ELG2NumDiscItemsCorrect_n + ELG2MissNumItemsCorrect_n + ELG2AddLvl1ItemsCorrect_n + ELG2AddLvl2ItemsCorrect_n + ELG2SubLvl1ItemsCorrect_n + ELG2SubLvl2ItemsCorrect_n +   ELG2WordProbItemsCorrect_n)

ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2EGMATotalAdjusted_n = round((ELG2NumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n + ELG2NumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n + ELG2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n + ELG2AddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n + ELG2AddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n + ELG2SubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n + ELG2SubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n + ELG2WordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)/8), sigdig2)

ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2EGMATotalPercent_n = (ELG2EGMATotal_n/96)*100)

ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2EGRATotal_n =  ELG2ListeningCompItemsCorrect_n + ELG2PhonAwareItemsCorrect_n + ELG2LetSoundItemsCorrect_n + ELG2InventWordItemsCorrect_n + ELG2RealWordsItemsCorrect_n + ELG2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrect_n + ELG2ReadCompItemsCorrect_n + ELG2Dictation_01_ItemsCorrect_n + ELG2Dictation_02_ItemsCorrect_n)

ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2EGRATotalAdjusted_n =  round((ELG2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n + ELG2PhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n + ELG2LetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n + ELG2InventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n + ELG2RealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n + ELG2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n + ELG2ReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n + ELG2Dictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n + ELG2Dictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n)/9), sigdig2)

ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2EGRATotalPercent_n = (ELG2EGRATotal_n/294)*100)
```

```{r create baseline student cross new numeric variables}
BNumIdentifyList <- c('BNumIdentify_01_n', 'BNumIdentify_02_n', 'BNumIdentify_03_n', 'BNumIdentify_04_n', 'BNumIdentify_05_n', 'BNumIdentify_06_n', 'BNumIdentify_07_n', 'BNumIdentify_08_n', 'BNumIdentify_09_n', 'BNumIdentify_10_n', 'BNumIdentify_11_n', 'BNumIdentify_12_n', 'BNumIdentify_13_n', 'BNumIdentify_14_n', 'BNumIdentify_15_n', 'BNumIdentify_16_n', 'BNumIdentify_17_n', 'BNumIdentify_18_n', 'BNumIdentify_19_n', 'BNumIdentify_20_n')

Bstudentsurveycross <- Bstudentsurveycross %>% mutate(BEGMATotalAdjusted_n = round((BNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n + BNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n + BMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n + BAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n + BAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n + BSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n + BSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n + BWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)/9), sigdig2)

Bstudentsurveycross <- Bstudentsurveycross %>% mutate(BEGMATotalPercent_n = (BEGMATotal_n/96)*100)

Bstudentsurveycross <- Bstudentsurveycross %>% mutate(BEGRATotal_n =  BListeningCompItemsCorrect_n + BPhonAwareItemsCorrect_n + BLetSoundItemsCorrect_n + BInventWordItemsCorrect_n + BRealWordsItemsCorrect_n + BOralRdFlncyItemsCorrect_n + BReadCompItemsCorrect_n + BDictation_01_ItemsCorrect_n + BDictation_02_ItemsCorrect_n)

Bstudentsurveycross <- Bstudentsurveycross %>% mutate(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n =  round((BListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n + BPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n + BLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n + BInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n + BRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n + BOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n + BReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n + BDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n + BDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n)/9), sigdig2)

Bstudentsurveycross <- Bstudentsurveycross %>% mutate(BEGRATotalPercent_n = (BEGRATotal_n/295)*100)
```

```{r create midline student cross new numeric variables}
Mstudentsurveycross$MLetSoundItemsAttempt_n <- apply(Mstudentsurveycross[MLetSoundList], 1, function(x) sum(!is.na(x)))

Mstudentsurveycross <- Mstudentsurveycross %>% mutate(MLetSoundItemsCorrect_n = ifelse(MLetSoundGridAutoStop_f=='TRUE', 0, MLetSoundItemsCorrect_n))

Mstudentsurveycross$MDictation_01_ItemsAttempt_n <- apply(Mstudentsurveycross[MDictation_01List], 1, function(x) sum(!is.na(x)))

Mstudentsurveycross$MDictation_02_ItemsAttempt_n <- apply(Mstudentsurveycross[MDictation_02List], 1, function(x) sum(!is.na(x)))

Mstudentsurveycross <- Mstudentsurveycross %>% mutate(MEGMATotal_n = MNumIdentifyItemsCorrect_n + MNumDiscItemsCorrect_n + MMissNumItemsCorrect_n + MAddLvl1ItemsCorrect_n + MAddLvl2ItemsCorrect_n + MSubLvl1ItemsCorrect_n + MSubLvl2ItemsCorrect_n + MWordProbItemsCorrect_n)

Mstudentsurveycross <- Mstudentsurveycross %>% mutate(MEGMATotalAdjusted_n = round((MNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n + MNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n + MMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n + MAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n + MAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n + MSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n + MSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n + MWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)/9), sigdig2)

Mstudentsurveycross <- Mstudentsurveycross %>% mutate(MEGMATotalPercent_n = (MEGMATotal_n/96)*100)

Mstudentsurveycross <- Mstudentsurveycross %>% mutate(MEGRATotal_n =  MListeningCompItemsCorrect_n + MPhonAwareItemsCorrect_n + MLetSoundItemsCorrect_n + MInventWordItemsCorrect_n + MRealWordsItemsCorrect_n + MOralRdFlncyItemsCorrect_n + MReadCompItemsCorrect_n + MDictation_01_ItemsCorrect_n + MDictation_02_ItemsCorrect_n)

Mstudentsurveycross <- Mstudentsurveycross %>% mutate(MEGRATotalAdjusted_n =  round((MListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n + MPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n + MLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n + MInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n + MRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n + MOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n + MReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n + MDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n + MDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n)/9), sigdig2)

Mstudentsurveycross <- Mstudentsurveycross %>% mutate(MEGRATotalPercent_n = (MEGRATotal_n/295)*100)
```

```{r create baseline student new factor variables}
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BListeningCompLearner_f = case_when(
	BListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n == 0 ~ 'Non-Learner',
	BListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n <= 40 ~ 'Emergent Learner',
	BListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n <= 80 ~ 'Established Learner',
	BListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n <= 100 ~ 'Proficient Learner'))
Bstudentsurveylong$BListeningCompLearner_f <- sapply(Bstudentsurveylong$BListeningCompLearner_f, as.factor)
Bstudentsurveylong$BListeningCompLearner_f <- fct_relevel(Bstudentsurveylong$BListeningCompLearner_f, "Non-Learner", "Emergent Learner", "Established Learner", "Proficient Learner")

Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BPhonAwareLearner_f = case_when(

  BOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 10 & BReadCompCorrectCat_f==20 ~ '2',

  TRUE ~ '5'
))

Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BOralRdFlncyLevel_f = case_when(
  BOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n == 0 ~ '0',
  BOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 10 ~ '10',
  BOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 20 ~ '20',
  BOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 30 ~ '30',
  BOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 40 ~ '40',
  BOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 50 ~ '50',
  BOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 60 ~ '60',
  BOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 70 ~ '70',
  BOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 80 ~ '80',
  BOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 90 ~ '90',
  BOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 100 ~ '100',
  BOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 110 ~ '110',
  BOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 120 ~ '120',
  TRUE ~ '130'
))	
```

```{r create midline student new factor variables}
))

  MOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 20 ~ '20',

  MOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 70 ~ '70',
  MOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 80 ~ '80',
  MOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 90 ~ '90',
  MOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 100 ~ '100',
  MOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 110 ~ '110',
  MOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 120 ~ '120',
  TRUE ~ '130'
))
```

```{r create baseline level 2 student new factor variables}
  BL2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 80 ~ '80',
  BL2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 90 ~ '90',
  BL2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 100 ~ '100',
  BL2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 110 ~ '110',
  BL2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 120 ~ '120',
  TRUE ~ '130'
))	

```

```{r create endline level 2 student new factor variables}
  EL2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 80 ~ '80',
  EL2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 90 ~ '90',
  EL2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 100 ~ '100',
  EL2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 110 ~ '110',
  EL2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 120 ~ '120',
  TRUE ~ '130'
))
```

```{r create endline level 1 grade 2 student new factor variables}
  ELG2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n==0 & ELG2ReadCompCorrectCat_f==0 ~ '1',
  ELG2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 10 & ELG2ReadCompCorrectCat_f==20 ~ '2',
  ELG2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n < 35 & ELG2ReadCompCorrectCat_f==40 ~ '3',
  ELG2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n >= 35 & ELG2ReadCompCorrectCat_f==80 ~ '4',
  TRUE ~ '5'
))

ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2OralRdFlncyLevel_f = case_when(
  ELG2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n == 0 ~ '0',
  ELG2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 10 ~ '10',
  ELG2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 20 ~ '20',
  ELG2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 30 ~ '30',
  ELG2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 40 ~ '40',
  ELG2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 50 ~ '50',
  ELG2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 60 ~ '60',
  ELG2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 70 ~ '70',
  ELG2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 80 ~ '80',
  ELG2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 90 ~ '90',
  ELG2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 100 ~ '100',
  ELG2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 110 ~ '110',
  ELG2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 120 ~ '120',
  TRUE ~ '130'
))
```

```{r create baseline student cross new factor variables}
))
```

```{r create midline student cross new factor variables}
  MOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n <= 120 ~ '120',
  TRUE ~ '130'
))
```

```{r set baseline student long factor levels}
Bstudentsurveylong$BBABProgram_f <- factor(Bstudentsurveylong$BBABProgram_f, levels = c('0', '1'), labels = c('Formal Primary', 'BAB'))
Bstudentsurveylong$BGrade_f <- factor(Bstudentsurveylong$BGrade_f, levels = c('1', '2'), labels = c('Grade 1', 'Grade 2'))

Bstudentsurveylong$BLanguages2_f <- factor(Bstudentsurveylong$BLanguages2_f, levels = c('1', '2', '9'), labels = c('Maay', 'Maxaa tiri', 'Other'))

Bstudentsurveylong$BAttendAnyOther_f <- factor(Bstudentsurveylong$BAttendAnyOther_f, levels=c('0', '1'), labels = c('No', 'Yes'))

location$State_f <- fct_relevel(location$State, "Benaadir", "Hirshabeelle", "Jubbaland", "South-West")
location$District_f <- fct_relevel(location$District_f, "Baydhabo", "Balcad", "Baraawe", "Dayniile", "Diinsoor", "Xamarwayne", "Jowhar", "Kaxda", "Kismaayo", "Shabis", "Wanlawayn")
location$LocationTypeDesc_f <- fct_relevel(location$LocationTypeDesc_f, "IDP","Rural", "Urban")
Bstudentsurveylong$BBABProgram_f <- fct_relevel(Bstudentsurveylong$BBABProgram_f, "BAB","Formal Primary")
Bstudentsurveylong$BStudentAgeGroup2_f <- fct_relevel(Bstudentsurveylong$BStudentAgeGroup2_f, "4 to 8 year olds", "9 to 16 year olds", "17 to 20 year olds")
Bstudentsurveylong$BStudentAgeGroup3_f <- fct_relevel(Bstudentsurveylong$BStudentAgeGroup3_f, "Under age Students (under 7)", "Primary Students (7-11)", "Intermediate Students (12-16)", "Older age Students (17 and over)")
```

```{r set midline student long factor levels}
Mstudentsurveylong$MAgeGroup3_f <- fct_relevel(Mstudentsurveylong$MAgeGroup3_f, "Under age Students (under 7)", "Primary Students (7-11)", "Intermediate Students (12-16)", "Older age Students (17 and over)")
```

```{r set baseline level 2 student long factor levels}
BL2studentsurveylong$BL2BABProgram_f <- factor(BL2studentsurveylong$BL2BABProgram_f, levels = c('0', '1'), labels = c('Formal Primary', 'BAB'))
BL2studentsurveylong$BL2Grade_f <- factor(BL2studentsurveylong$BL2Grade_f, levels = c('1', '2'), labels = c('Grade 1', 'Grade 2'))
BL2studentsurveylong$BL2ProgramGrade_f <- factor(BL2studentsurveylong$BL2ProgramGrade_f, levels = c('0', '1', '2'), labels = c('BAB', 'Formal Primary Grade 1', 'Formal Primary Grade 2'))
BL2studentsurveylong$BL2ProgramGrade2_f <- factor(BL2studentsurveylong$BL2ProgramGrade2_f, levels = c('0', '1', '2'), labels = c('BAB', 'Formal\nPrimary\nGrade 1', 'Formal\nPrimary\nGrade 2'))
BL2studentsurveylong$BL2ProgramGrade3_f <- factor(BL2studentsurveylong$BL2ProgramGrade3_f, levels = c('0', '1', '2'), labels = c('BAB Only', 'Formal Primary Grade 1', 'Formal Primary Grade 2'))
BL2studentsurveylong$BL2Gender_f <- factor(BL2studentsurveylong$BL2Gender_f, levels = c('1', '2'), labels = c('Male', 'Female'))
BL2studentsurveylong$BL2Gender2_f <- fct_relevel(BL2studentsurveylong$BL2Gender_f, 'Female', 'Male')
BL2studentsurveylong$BL2IDPFamily_f <- factor(BL2studentsurveylong$BL2IDPFamily_f, levels = c('0', '1'), labels = c('Not IDP Family', 'IDP Family')) 

BL2studentsurveylong$BL2BABProgram_f <- fct_relevel(BL2studentsurveylong$BL2BABProgram_f, "BAB","Formal Primary")
BL2studentsurveylong$BL2AgeGroup2_f <- fct_relevel(BL2studentsurveylong$BL2AgeGroup2_f, "4 to 8 year olds", "9 to 16 year olds", "17 to 20 year olds")
BL2studentsurveylong$BL2AgeGroup3_f <- fct_relevel(BL2studentsurveylong$BL2AgeGroup3_f, "Under age Students (under 7)", "Primary Students (7-11)", "Intermediate Students (12-16)", "Older age Students (17 and over)")
```


```{r set baseline and midline student cross factor levels}
Bstudentsurveycross$BGender_f <- factor(Bstudentsurveycross$BGender_f, levels = c('1', '2'), labels = c('Male', 'Female'))

Mstudentsurveycross$MGender_f <- factor(Mstudentsurveycross$MGender_f, levels = c('1', '2'), labels = c('Male', 'Female'))
```

```{r create baseline student scale items}
## Create Learner Survey Scale items
BSES_List <- c('BSES_04', 'BSES_05', 'BSES_07')
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BSES_Avg = rowMeans(Bstudentsurveylong[BSES_List], na.rm = TRUE))
Bstudentsurveylong$BSES_Avg <- round(Bstudentsurveylong$BSES_Avg, 2)
##BSESalphasummary <- alpha(Bstudentsurveylong[BSES_List], na.rm = TRUE)
##BSESCA <- round(BSESalphasummary$total[1,1], 3)
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BSES_Sum = rowSums(Bstudentsurveylong[BSES_List]))
Bstudentsurveylong$BSES_Sum_f <- as.factor(Bstudentsurveylong$BSES_Sum)
Bstudentsurveylong$BSES_Sum_f <- factor(Bstudentsurveylong$BSES_Sum_f, levels = c('0', '1', '2', '3'), labels = c('none', 'low', 'medium', 'high'))

BSafety_List <- c('BSafety_01', 'BSafety_02')
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BSafety_Avg = rowMeans(Bstudentsurveylong[BSafety_List], na.rm = TRUE))
Bstudentsurveylong$BSafety_Avg <- round(Bstudentsurveylong$BSafety_Avg, 2)
##BSafetyalphasummary <- alpha(Bstudentsurveylong[BSafety_List], na.rm = TRUE)
##BSafetyCA <- round(BSafetyalphasummary$total[1,1], 3)

BEmtnlEngage_List <- c('BEmtnlEngage_01', 'BEmtnlEngage_02', 'BEmtnlEngage_03')
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BEmtnlEngage_Avg = rowMeans(Bstudentsurveylong[BEmtnlEngage_List], na.rm = TRUE))
Bstudentsurveylong$BEmtnlEngage_Avg <- round(Bstudentsurveylong$BEmtnlEngage_Avg, 2)
##BEmtnlEngagealphasummary <- alpha(Bstudentsurveylong[BEmtnlEngage_List], na.rm = TRUE)
##BEngagementCA <- round(BEmtnlEngagealphasummary$total[1,1], 3)

## Create place holders for variables that did not exist at Baseline
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BBehaveEngage_Avg = NA)
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BCognitEngage_Avg = NA)
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BPhysWellBeing_Avg = NA)
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BHope_Avg = NA)
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BEmpathy_Avg = NA)

Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BStdntSatis_Avg = NA)
```

```{r create midline student scale items}
## Create Learner Survey Scale items

## Equity

## Emotional Well Being

## Physical Well Being

## Self Esteem
MSelfEsteem_List <- c('MSelfEsteem_01', 'MSelfEsteem_02', 'MSelfEsteem_03', 'MSelfEsteem_04', 'MSelfEsteem_05')
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MSelfEsteem_Avg = rowMeans(Mstudentsurveylong[MSelfEsteem_List], na.rm = TRUE))
Mstudentsurveylong$MSelfEsteem_Avg <- round(Mstudentsurveylong$MSelfEsteem_Avg, 2)

MSelfEsteemCA <- round(MSelfEsteemalphasummary$total[1,1], 3)

## Friendship - Social Well-being
MFriendship_List <- c('MFriendship_01', 'MFriendship_02', 'MFriendship_03')

Mstudentsurveylong$Friendship_Avg <- round(Mstudentsurveylong$MFriendship_Avg, 2)

##MFriendshipCA <- round(MFriendshipalphasummary$total[1,1], 3)

## Quality of Life School
MSchool_List <- c('MSchool_01', 'MSchool_02')
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MSchool_Avg = rowMeans(Mstudentsurveylong[MSchool_List], na.rm = TRUE))
Mstudentsurveylong$MSchool_Avg <- round(Mstudentsurveylong$MSchool_Avg, 2)
##MSchoolalphasummary <- alpha(Mstudentsurveylong[MSchool_List], na.rm = TRUE)

## Quality of Life (Self Esteem + Emtnl Well Being + PhysWellBeingRecode + Friendship)
MQualityOfLife_List <- c('MSelfEsteem_Avg', 'MEmtnlWellBeing_01', 'MPhysWellBeing_04', 'MFriendship_Avg')
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MQualityofLife_Avg = rowMeans(Mstudentsurveylong[MQualityOfLife_List], na.rm = TRUE))
Mstudentsurveylong$MQualityofLife_Avg <- round(Mstudentsurveylong$MQualityofLife_Avg, 2)

## Empathy
MEmpathy_List <- c('MEmpathy_01', 'MEmpathy_02', 'MEmpathy_03')
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MEmpathy_Avg = rowMeans(Mstudentsurveylong[MEmpathy_List], na.rm = TRUE))
Mstudentsurveylong$MEmpathy_Avg <- round(Mstudentsurveylong$MEmpathy_Avg, 2)

## Civic Engagement
MCivicEngage_List <- c('MCivicEngage_01', 'MCivicEngage_02', 'MCivicEngage_03')
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MCivicEngage_Avg = rowMeans(Mstudentsurveylong[MCivicEngage_List], na.rm = TRUE))
Mstudentsurveylong$MCivicEngage_Avg <- round(Mstudentsurveylong$MCivicEngage_Avg, 2)

## Student Satisfaction
MStdntSatis_List <- c('MStdntSatis_01', 'MStdntSatis_02', 'MStdntSatis_03', 'MStdntSatis_04', 'MStdntSatis_05', 'MStdntSatis_06')
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MStdntSatis_Avg = rowMeans(Mstudentsurveylong[MStdntSatis_List], na.rm = TRUE))
Mstudentsurveylong$MStdntSatis_Avg <- round(Mstudentsurveylong$MStdntSatis_Avg, 2)

MStdntSatisCNV_List <- c('MStdntSatisCNV_01_n', 'MStdntSatisCNV_02_n', 'MStdntSatisCNV_03_n', 'MStdntSatisCNV_04_n', 'MStdntSatisCNV_05_n', 'MStdntSatisCNV_06_n')

Mstudentsurveylong$MStdntSatisCNV_Avg <- round(Mstudentsurveylong$MStdntSatisCNV_Avg, 2)
MStdntSatisCNValphasummary <- psych::alpha(Mstudentsurveylong[MStdntSatisCNV_List], na.rm = TRUE)
MStdntSatisCNVCA <- round(MStdntSatisCNValphasummary$total[1,1], 3)

## Hope Agency
MHopeAgency_List <- c('MHopeAgency_01', 'MHopeAgency_02', 'MHopeAgency_03')

## Hope

Mstudentsurveylong$MHope_Avg <- round(Mstudentsurveylong$MHope_Avg, 2)
```

```{r create endline level 2 student scale items}
## Create Learner Survey Scale items
EL2SES_List <- c('EL2SES_01_n', 'EL2SES_04_n', 'EL2SES_05_n', 'EL2SES_06_n', 'EL2SES_07_n', 'EL2SES_09_n', 'EL2SES_10_n')

EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2SES_Avg = rowMeans(EL2studentsurveylong[EL2SES_List], na.rm = TRUE))
EL2studentsurveylong$EL2SES_Avg <- round(EL2studentsurveylong$EL2SES_Avg, 2)
EL2SESalphasummary <- psych::alpha(EL2studentsurveylong[EL2SES_List], na.rm = TRUE)
EL2SESCA <- round(EL2SESalphasummary$total[1,1], 3)
EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2SES_Sum = rowSums(EL2studentsurveylong[EL2SES_List]))
EL2studentsurveylong$EL2SES_Sum_f <- as.factor(EL2studentsurveylong$EL2SES_Sum)
EL2studentsurveylong$EL2SES_Sum_f <- factor(EL2studentsurveylong$EL2SES_Sum_f, levels = c('0', '1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '7'), labels = c('low', 'low', 'low', 'medium', 'medium', 'medium', 'high', 'high'))

EL2CHR_INFLNC_List <- c('EL2CHR_INFLNC_01_n', 'EL2CHR_INFLNC_02_n', 'EL2CHR_INFLNC_03_n', 'EL2CHR_INFLNC_04_n')
EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2CHR_INFLNC_Avg = rowMeans(EL2studentsurveylong[EL2CHR_INFLNC_List], na.rm = TRUE))
EL2studentsurveylong$EL2CHR_INFLNC_Avg <- round(EL2studentsurveylong$EL2CHR_INFLNC_Avg, 2)
EL2CHR_INFLNCalphasummary <- psych::alpha(EL2studentsurveylong[EL2CHR_INFLNC_List], na.rm = TRUE)
EL2CHR_INFLNCCA <- round(EL2CHR_INFLNCalphasummary$total[1,1], 3)

EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2CHR_INFLNC_LKRT = case_when(
EL2CHR_INFLNC_Avg <= 0.5 ~ "none of the time",
EL2CHR_INFLNC_Avg <= 1.5 ~ "a little of the time",
EL2CHR_INFLNC_Avg <= 2.5 ~ "some of the time",
EL2CHR_INFLNC_Avg <= 3.5 ~ "a lot of the time",
EL2CHR_INFLNC_Avg <= 4.5 ~ "most of the time",
EL2CHR_INFLNC_Avg <= 5.0 ~ "all of the time"))

EL2studentsurveylong$EL2CHR_INFLNC_LKRT <- sapply(EL2studentsurveylong$EL2CHR_INFLNC_LKRT, as.factor)

EL2studentsurveylong$EL2CHR_INFLNC_LKRT <- fct_relevel(EL2studentsurveylong$EL2CHR_INFLNC_LKRT, "none of the time", "a little of the time", "some of the time", "a lot of the time", "most of the time", "all of the time")




EL2Safety_List <- c('EL2SafetyHome', 'EL2SafetySchool', 'EL2SafetyCmmnty')
EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2Safety_Avg = rowMeans(EL2studentsurveylong[EL2Safety_List], na.rm = TRUE))
EL2studentsurveylong$EL2Safety_Avg <- round(EL2studentsurveylong$EL2Safety_Avg, 2)
EL2Safetyalphasummary <- psych::alpha(EL2studentsurveylong[EL2Safety_List], na.rm = TRUE)
EL2SafetyCA <- round(EL2Safetyalphasummary$total[1,1], 3)

EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2Safety_LKRT = case_when(
EL2Safety_Avg <= 0.5 ~ "none of the time",
EL2Safety_Avg <= 1.5 ~ "a little of the time",
EL2Safety_Avg <= 2.5 ~ "some of the time",
EL2Safety_Avg <= 3.5 ~ "a lot of the time",
EL2Safety_Avg <= 4.5 ~ "most of the time",
EL2Safety_Avg <= 5.0 ~ "all of the time"))

EL2studentsurveylong$EL2Safety_LKRT <- sapply(EL2studentsurveylong$EL2Safety_LKRT, as.factor)

## Student Satisfaction
EL2StdntSatis_List <- c('EL2StdntSatis_01_n', 'EL2StdntSatis_02_n', 'EL2StdntSatis_03_n', 'EL2StdntSatis_04_n', 'EL2StdntSatis_05_n', 'EL2StdntSatis_06_n')

EL2StdntSatisCA <- round(EL2StdntSatisalphasummary$total[1,1], 3)

EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2StdntSatis_LKRT = case_when(
EL2StdntSatis_Avg <= 0.5 ~ "strongly disagree",
EL2StdntSatis_Avg <= 1.5 ~ "disagree",
EL2StdntSatis_Avg <= 2.5 ~ "neither agree nor disagree",
EL2StdntSatis_Avg <= 3.5 ~ "agree",
EL2StdntSatis_Avg <= 4.0 ~ "strongly agree"))

EL2studentsurveylong$EL2StdntSatis_LKRT <- sapply(EL2studentsurveylong$EL2StdntSatis_LKRT, as.factor)

EL2studentsurveylong$EL2StdntSatis_LKRT <- fct_relevel(EL2studentsurveylong$EL2StdntSatis_LKRT, "strongly disagree", "disagree", "neither agree nor disagree", "agree", "strongly agree")



## Student Satisfaction Converted
EL2StdntSatisCNV_List <- c('EL2StdntSatisCNV_01_n', 'EL2StdntSatisCNV_02_n', 'EL2StdntSatisCNV_03_n', 'EL2StdntSatisCNV_04_n', 'EL2StdntSatisCNV_05_n', 'EL2StdntSatisCNV_06_n')

EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2StdntSatisCNV_LKRT = case_when(
EL2StdntSatisCNV_Avg <= 0.625 ~ "strongly disagree",
EL2StdntSatisCNV_Avg <= 1.875 ~ "disagree",
EL2StdntSatisCNV_Avg <= 3.125 ~ "neither agree nor disagree",
EL2StdntSatisCNV_Avg <= 4.375 ~ "agree",
EL2StdntSatisCNV_Avg <= 5.0 ~ "strongly agree"))

EL2studentsurveylong$EL2StdntSatisCNV_LKRT <- sapply(EL2studentsurveylong$EL2StdntSatisCNV_LKRT, as.factor)

EL2studentsurveylong$EL2StdntSatisCNV_LKRT <- fct_relevel(EL2studentsurveylong$EL2StdntSatisCNV_LKRT, "strongly disagree", "disagree", "neither agree nor disagree", "agree", "strongly agree")



## Community Belonging Satisfaction
EL2CmmntyBlngng_List <- c('EL2CmmntyBlngng_01_n', 'EL2CmmntyBlngng_02_n', 'EL2CmmntyBlngng_03_n', 'EL2CmmntyBlngng_04_n', 'EL2CmmntyBlngng_05_n')
EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2CmmntyBlngng_Avg = rowMeans(EL2studentsurveylong[EL2CmmntyBlngng_List], na.rm = TRUE))
EL2studentsurveylong$EL2CmmntyBlngng_Avg <- round(EL2studentsurveylong$EL2CmmntyBlngng_Avg, 2)
EL2CmmntyBlngngalphasummary <- psych::alpha(EL2studentsurveylong[EL2CmmntyBlngng_List], na.rm = TRUE)
EL2CmmntyBlngngCA <- round(EL2CmmntyBlngngalphasummary$total[1,1], 3)

EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2CmmntyBlngng_LKRT = case_when(
EL2CmmntyBlngng_Avg <= 0.5 ~ "strongly disagree",
EL2CmmntyBlngng_Avg <= 1.5 ~ "disagree",
EL2CmmntyBlngng_Avg <= 2.5 ~ "neither agree nor disagree",
EL2CmmntyBlngng_Avg <= 3.5 ~ "agree",
EL2CmmntyBlngng_Avg <= 4.0 ~ "strongly agree"))

EL2studentsurveylong$EL2CmmntyBlngng_LKRT <- sapply(EL2studentsurveylong$EL2CmmntyBlngng_LKRT, as.factor)

EL2studentsurveylong$EL2CmmntyBlngng_LKRT <- fct_relevel(EL2studentsurveylong$EL2CmmntyBlngng_LKRT, "strongly disagree", "disagree", "neither agree nor disagree", "agree", "strongly agree")



## Student Satisfaction Converted
EL2CmmntyBlngngCNV_List <- c('EL2CmmntyBlngngCNV_01_n', 'EL2CmmntyBlngngCNV_02_n', 'EL2CmmntyBlngngCNV_03_n', 'EL2CmmntyBlngngCNV_04_n', 'EL2CmmntyBlngngCNV_05_n')
EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2CmmntyBlngngCNV_Avg = rowMeans(EL2studentsurveylong[EL2CmmntyBlngngCNV_List], na.rm = TRUE))
EL2studentsurveylong$EL2CmmntyBlngngCNV_Avg <- round(EL2studentsurveylong$EL2CmmntyBlngngCNV_Avg, 2)
EL2CmmntyBlngngCNValphasummary <- psych::alpha(EL2studentsurveylong[EL2CmmntyBlngngCNV_List], na.rm = TRUE)
EL2CmmntyBlngngCNVCA <- round(EL2CmmntyBlngngCNValphasummary$total[1,1], 3)

EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2CmmntyBlngngCNV_LKRT = case_when(
EL2CmmntyBlngngCNV_Avg <= 0.625 ~ "strongly disagree",
EL2CmmntyBlngngCNV_Avg <= 1.875 ~ "disagree",
EL2CmmntyBlngngCNV_Avg <= 3.125 ~ "neither agree nor disagree",
EL2CmmntyBlngngCNV_Avg <= 4.375 ~ "agree",
EL2CmmntyBlngngCNV_Avg <= 5.0 ~ "strongly agree"))

EL2studentsurveylong$EL2CmmntyBlngngCNV_LKRT <- sapply(EL2studentsurveylong$EL2CmmntyBlngngCNV_LKRT, as.factor)

EL2studentsurveylong$EL2CmmntyBlngngCNV_LKRT <- fct_relevel(EL2studentsurveylong$EL2CmmntyBlngngCNV_LKRT, "strongly disagree", "disagree", "neither agree nor disagree", "agree", "strongly agree")



##DemoComposite Created to look at the compounding of demographic disparities
## uses key demographic variables to add up to a composite where a low number means more disparity and a higher number means less disparity

EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2DemoComposite = ifelse (EL2IDPFamily_n == 0, 1, 0))
EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2DemoComposite = ifelse(EL2SES_Sum > 3, EL2DemoComposite + 1, EL2DemoComposite))

EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2DemoComposite = ifelse (EL2StudentLivesWithOtherCode == 0, EL2DemoComposite + 1, EL2DemoComposite))

EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2DemoComposite = EL2DemoComposite + EL2MotherLiteracy_n + EL2FatherLiteracy_n)

EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2DemoComposite = EL2DemoComposite + EL2Languages3_n)
```

```{r create endline level 1 grade 2 student scale items}
## Create Learner Survey Scale items
ELG2SES_List <- c('ELG2SES_01_n', 'ELG2SES_04_n', 'ELG2SES_05_n', 'ELG2SES_06_n', 'ELG2SES_07_n', 'ELG2SES_09_n', 'ELG2SES_10_n')

ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2SES_Avg = rowMeans(ELG2studentsurveylong[ELG2SES_List], na.rm = TRUE))
ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2SES_Avg <- round(ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2SES_Avg, 2)
ELG2SESalphasummary <- psych::alpha(ELG2studentsurveylong[ELG2SES_List], na.rm = TRUE)
ELG2SESCA <- round(ELG2SESalphasummary$total[1,1], 3)
ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2SES_Sum = rowSums(ELG2studentsurveylong[ELG2SES_List]))
ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2SES_Sum_f <- as.factor(ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2SES_Sum)
ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2SES_Sum_f <- factor(ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2SES_Sum_f, levels = c('0', '1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '7'), labels = c('low', 'low', 'low', 'medium', 'medium', 'medium', 'high', 'high'))

ELG2CHR_INFLNC_List <- c('ELG2CHR_INFLNC_01_n', 'ELG2CHR_INFLNC_02_n', 'ELG2CHR_INFLNC_03_n', 'ELG2CHR_INFLNC_04_n')

ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2CHR_INFLNC_LKRT = case_when(
ELG2CHR_INFLNC_Avg <= 0.5 ~ "none of the time",
ELG2CHR_INFLNC_Avg <= 1.5 ~ "a little of the time",
ELG2CHR_INFLNC_Avg <= 2.5 ~ "some of the time",
ELG2CHR_INFLNC_Avg <= 3.5 ~ "a lot of the time",

ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2SelfEsteem_LKRT <- sapply(ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2SelfEsteem_LKRT, as.factor)

ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2SelfEsteem_LKRT <- fct_relevel(ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2SelfEsteem_LKRT, "none of the time", "a little of the time", "some of the time", "a lot of the time", "most of the time", "all of the time")



## Hope Agency
ELG2HopeAgency_List <- c('ELG2HopeAgency_01_n', 'ELG2HopeAgency_02_n', 'ELG2HopeAgency_03_n')

ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2HopeAgency_Avg <- round(ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2HopeAgency_Avg, 2)

## Hope

## Student Satisfaction
ELG2StdntSatis_List <- c('ELG2StdntSatis_01_n', 'ELG2StdntSatis_02_n', 'ELG2StdntSatis_03_n', 'ELG2StdntSatis_04_n', 'ELG2StdntSatis_05_n', 'ELG2StdntSatis_06_n')
ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2StdntSatis_Avg = rowMeans(ELG2studentsurveylong[ELG2StdntSatis_List], na.rm = TRUE))
ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2StdntSatis_Avg <- round(ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2StdntSatis_Avg, 2)

ELG2StdntSatisCA <- round(ELG2StdntSatisalphasummary$total[1,1], 3)

ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2StdntSatis_LKRT = case_when(
ELG2StdntSatis_Avg <= 0.5 ~ "strongly disagree",
ELG2StdntSatis_Avg <= 1.5 ~ "disagree",
ELG2StdntSatis_Avg <= 2.5 ~ "neither agree nor disagree",
ELG2StdntSatis_Avg <= 3.5 ~ "agree",
ELG2StdntSatis_Avg <= 4.0 ~ "strongly agree"))

ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2StdntSatis_LKRT <- fct_relevel(ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2StdntSatis_LKRT, "strongly disagree", "disagree", "neither agree nor disagree", "agree", "strongly agree")



## Student Satisfaction Converted
ELG2StdntSatisCNV_List <- c('ELG2StdntSatisCNV_01_n', 'ELG2StdntSatisCNV_02_n', 'ELG2StdntSatisCNV_03_n', 'ELG2StdntSatisCNV_04_n', 'ELG2StdntSatisCNV_05_n', 'ELG2StdntSatisCNV_06_n')
ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2StdntSatisCNV_Avg = rowMeans(ELG2studentsurveylong[ELG2StdntSatisCNV_List], na.rm = TRUE))

ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2StdntSatisCNV_LKRT = case_when(
ELG2StdntSatisCNV_Avg <= 0.625 ~ "strongly disagree",
ELG2StdntSatisCNV_Avg <= 1.875 ~ "disagree",
ELG2StdntSatisCNV_Avg <= 3.125 ~ "neither agree nor disagree",
ELG2StdntSatisCNV_Avg <= 4.375 ~ "agree",

ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2StdntSatisCNV_LKRT <- sapply(ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2StdntSatisCNV_LKRT, as.factor)

ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2StdntSatisCNV_LKRT <- fct_relevel(ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2StdntSatisCNV_LKRT, "strongly disagree", "disagree", "neither agree nor disagree", "agree", "strongly agree")



## Community Belonging Satisfaction
ELG2CmmntyBlngng_List <- c('ELG2CmmntyBlngng_01_n', 'ELG2CmmntyBlngng_02_n', 'ELG2CmmntyBlngng_03_n', 'ELG2CmmntyBlngng_04_n', 'ELG2CmmntyBlngng_05_n')
ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2CmmntyBlngng_Avg = rowMeans(ELG2studentsurveylong[ELG2CmmntyBlngng_List], na.rm = TRUE))
ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2CmmntyBlngng_Avg <- round(ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2CmmntyBlngng_Avg, 2)

ELG2CmmntyBlngngCA <- round(ELG2CmmntyBlngngalphasummary$total[1,1], 3)

ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2CmmntyBlngng_LKRT = case_when(

ELG2CmmntyBlngng_Avg <= 1.5 ~ "disagree",
ELG2CmmntyBlngng_Avg <= 2.5 ~ "neither agree nor disagree",
ELG2CmmntyBlngng_Avg <= 3.5 ~ "agree",
ELG2CmmntyBlngng_Avg <= 4.0 ~ "strongly agree"))

ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2CmmntyBlngng_LKRT <- sapply(ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2CmmntyBlngng_LKRT, as.factor)

ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2CmmntyBlngng_LKRT <- fct_relevel(ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2CmmntyBlngng_LKRT, "strongly disagree", "disagree", "neither agree nor disagree", "agree", "strongly agree")




## Community Belonging Satisfaction Converted
ELG2CmmntyBlngngCNV_List <- c('ELG2CmmntyBlngngCNV_01_n', 'ELG2CmmntyBlngngCNV_02_n', 'ELG2CmmntyBlngngCNV_03_n', 'ELG2CmmntyBlngngCNV_04_n', 'ELG2CmmntyBlngngCNV_05_n')
ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2CmmntyBlngngCNV_Avg = rowMeans(ELG2studentsurveylong[ELG2CmmntyBlngngCNV_List], na.rm = TRUE))
ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2CmmntyBlngngCNV_Avg <- round(ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2CmmntyBlngngCNV_Avg, 2)
ELG2CmmntyBlngngCNValphasummary <- psych::alpha(ELG2studentsurveylong[ELG2CmmntyBlngngCNV_List], na.rm = TRUE)
ELG2CmmntyBlngngCNVCA <- round(ELG2CmmntyBlngngCNValphasummary$total[1,1], 3)

ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2CmmntyBlngngCNV_LKRT = case_when(
ELG2CmmntyBlngngCNV_Avg <= 0.625 ~ "strongly disagree",
ELG2CmmntyBlngngCNV_Avg <= 1.875 ~ "disagree",
ELG2CmmntyBlngngCNV_Avg <= 3.125 ~ "neither agree nor disagree",
ELG2CmmntyBlngngCNV_Avg <= 4.375 ~ "agree",
ELG2CmmntyBlngngCNV_Avg <= 5.0 ~ "strongly agree"))

ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2CmmntyBlngngCNV_LKRT <- sapply(ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2CmmntyBlngngCNV_LKRT, as.factor)

ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2CmmntyBlngngCNV_LKRT <- fct_relevel(ELG2studentsurveylong$ELG2CmmntyBlngngCNV_LKRT, "strongly disagree", "disagree", "neither agree nor disagree", "agree", "strongly agree")



ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2DemoComposite = ifelse (ELG2IDPFamily_n == 0, 1, 0))
ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2DemoComposite = ifelse(ELG2SES_Sum > 3, ELG2DemoComposite + 1, ELG2DemoComposite))

ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2DemoComposite = ifelse (ELG2StudentLivesWithOtherCode == 0, ELG2DemoComposite + 1, ELG2DemoComposite))

ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2DemoComposite = ELG2DemoComposite + ELG2MotherLiteracy_n + ELG2FatherLiteracy_n)

ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2DemoComposite = ELG2DemoComposite + ELG2Languages3_n)
```

```{r identify matched students and number of data points per student}
## create duplicate id columns to maintain after join
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(BStudentId2 = BStudentId)
Mstudentsurveylong <- Mstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(MStudentId2 = MStudentId)
EL2studentsurveylong <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(EL2StudentId2 = EL2StudentId)
ELG2studentsurveylong <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(ELG2StudentId2 = ELG2StudentId)

## merge baseline and midline ids into new dataframe
StudentsMatchedStep1DF <- merge(Bstudentsurveylong, Mstudentsurveylong, by.x = "BStudentId", by.y = "MStudentId", all.x = TRUE, all.y = TRUE) %>% dplyr::select(BStudentId, BStudentId2, MStudentId2)

## merge step 1 with baseline level 2 data that already has a duplicate studentId column
StudentsMatchedStep2DF <- merge(StudentsMatchedStep1DF, BL2studentsurveylong, by.x = "BStudentId", by.y = "BL2StudentId", all.x = TRUE, all.y = TRUE) %>% dplyr::select(BStudentId, BStudentId2, MStudentId2, BL2StudentId2)

## add endline level 2 data and endline level 1 grade 2 data
EL2Ids <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% dplyr::select("EL2StudentId"=EL2StudentId, EL2StudentId2)
ELG2Ids <- ELG2studentsurveylong %>% dplyr::select("ELG2StudentId"=ELG2StudentId, ELG2StudentId2)

## merge step 2 data with endline level 2 data
StudentsMatchedStep3DF <- merge(StudentsMatchedStep2DF, EL2Ids, by.x = "BStudentId", by.y = "EL2StudentId", all.x = TRUE, all.y = TRUE) %>% dplyr::select(BStudentId, BStudentId2, MStudentId2, BL2StudentId2, EL2StudentId2)

## merge step 2 data with endline level 1 grade 2 data
StudentsMatchedStep4DF <- merge(StudentsMatchedStep3DF, ELG2Ids, by.x = "BStudentId", by.y = "ELG2StudentId", all.x = TRUE, all.y = TRUE) %>% dplyr::select(BStudentId, BStudentId2, MStudentId2, BL2StudentId2, EL2StudentId2, ELG2StudentId2)


## replace studentid2 values with letters to concatenate together 
StudentsMatchedStep4DF$BStudentId2 <- sapply(StudentsMatchedStep4DF$BStudentId2, function(BStudentId2) ifelse(!is.na(BStudentId2), "B", NA)) 

StudentsMatchedStep4DF$MStudentId2 <- sapply(StudentsMatchedStep4DF$MStudentId2, function(MStudentId2) ifelse(!is.na(MStudentId2), "M", NA))

StudentsMatchedStep4DF$BL2StudentId2 <- sapply(StudentsMatchedStep4DF$BL2StudentId2, function(BL2StudentId2) ifelse(!is.na(BL2StudentId2), "BL2", NA))

StudentsMatchedStep4DF$EL2StudentId2 <- sapply(StudentsMatchedStep4DF$EL2StudentId2, function(EL2StudentId2) ifelse(!is.na(EL2StudentId2), "EL2", NA))

StudentsMatchedStep4DF$ELG2StudentId2 <- sapply(StudentsMatchedStep4DF$ELG2StudentId2, function(ELG2StudentId2) ifelse(!is.na(ELG2StudentId2), "ELG2", NA))


## Combine 4 ids together
StudentsMatchedStep4DF <- StudentsMatchedStep4DF %>% mutate(MatchPoint = paste0(BStudentId2, MStudentId2, BL2StudentId2, EL2StudentId2, ELG2StudentId2))

## remove NA's in the MatchPoint that were created from the paste0 above
StudentsMatchedStep4DF$MatchPoint <- gsub('NA', '', StudentsMatchedStep4DF$MatchPoint)

## count non NA's to create new datapoints column that tell us how many datapoints each student has
StudentsMatchedStep4DF$DataPoints <- rowSums(!is.na(StudentsMatchedStep4DF[,2:6]))

## Create StudentsMatchedStep4DF with the BStudentId, MatchPoint and DataPoints columns to add back to data files
StudentsMatchedStep5DF <- StudentsMatchedStep4DF %>% dplyr::select(BStudentId, MatchPoint, DataPoints)

## Merge matchpoint and datapoints fields back into original data files
Bstudentsurveylong <- merge(Bstudentsurveylong, StudentsMatchedStep5DF, by.x='BStudentId', by.y='BStudentId', all.x=TRUE, all.y=FALSE)

Mstudentsurveylong <- merge(Mstudentsurveylong, StudentsMatchedStep5DF, by.x='MStudentId', by.y='BStudentId', all.x=TRUE, all.y=FALSE)

BL2studentsurveylong <- merge(BL2studentsurveylong, StudentsMatchedStep5DF, by.x='BL2StudentId', by.y='BStudentId', all.x=TRUE, all.y=FALSE)

EL2studentsurveylong <- merge(EL2studentsurveylong, StudentsMatchedStep5DF, by.x='EL2StudentId', by.y='BStudentId', all.x=TRUE, all.y=FALSE) 

ELG2studentsurveylong <- merge(ELG2studentsurveylong, StudentsMatchedStep5DF, by.x='ELG2StudentId', by.y='BStudentId', all.x=TRUE, all.y=FALSE)

## Create retention variable for 2 year overall dataset
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(Retention = ifelse((MatchPoint == 'BBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BELG2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMELG2'), 1, 0))
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(RetentionDesc_f = ifelse((MatchPoint == 'BBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BELG2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMELG2'), "yes", "no"))
Bstudentsurveylong$RetentionDesc_f <- sapply(Bstudentsurveylong$RetentionDesc_f, as.factor)

## create baseline to midline or year 1 retention variable for baseline dataset
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(Yr1Retention = ifelse((MatchPoint == 'BM' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMELG2'), 1, 0))
Bstudentsurveylong <- Bstudentsurveylong %>% mutate(Yr1RetentionDesc_f = ifelse((MatchPoint == 'BM' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMELG2'), "yes", "no"))
Bstudentsurveylong$Yr1RetentionDesc_f <- sapply(Bstudentsurveylong$Yr1RetentionDesc_f, as.factor)

# create midline to endline or year 2 retention variable for baseline dataset EL2
BL2studentsurveylong <- BL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(Yr2Retention = ifelse((MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'MBL2EL2'), 1, 0))
BL2studentsurveylong <- BL2studentsurveylong %>% mutate(Yr2RetentionDesc_f = ifelse((MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'MBL2EL2'), "yes", "no"))
BL2studentsurveylong$Yr2RetentionDesc_f <- sapply(BL2studentsurveylong$Yr2RetentionDesc_f, as.factor)
```

```{r save stduent data frames for main report}
## set working directory to grab endline level 2 student survey data
setwd("C:/Users/besse/My Files/Somalia/Endline/Longitudinal/")
save(location, Bstudentsurveylong, EL2SelfEsteemalphasummary, BSelfEsteemalphasummary, MSelfEsteemalphasummary, Mstudentsurveylong, BL2studentsurveylong, EL2studentsurveylong, ELG2studentsurveylong, Bstudentsurveycross, Mstudentsurveycross, file="studentendlineprep.RData")

```
